hero.name: Vladimir
hero.subheadline: Frontend Developer with {years}+ years of professional experience building modern web applications.
hero.description: Specialized in React, Next.js and modern JavaScript technologies. Currently building high-performance web apps for the online gaming industry.

about.bio1: I'm a [[Frontend Developer]] with professional experience since December 2021, currently working at [[Gemini Infotech]] where I develop and maintain web applications for the online gaming industry.
about.bio2: My day-to-day involves building [[reusable UI component libraries]], integrating REST APIs, and continuously optimizing application performance. I care deeply about writing clean, maintainable code and delivering seamless, responsive user experiences.
about.bio3: I collaborate closely with backend developers and QA teams, participate in code reviews, and take ownership of frontend architecture decisions. I thrive in environments that value craftsmanship and technical excellence.

skills.title: Technologies I work with
skills.subtitle: A curated set of tools and technologies I use daily to build modern, performant web applications.

experience.title: Professional journey
experience.subtitle: My professional experience building production web applications.

items.description: Developing and maintaining web applications for the online gaming industry, working within agile teams to deliver performant, scalable frontend solutions.
responsibilities: Development and maintenance of React applications
Implementation of new features and UI components
Responsive UI development across all device sizes
Collaboration with backend developers and QA teams

projects.title: Selected work
projects.subtitle: A selection of projects I've built. More on my GitHub.

items.title: Casino Lobby Clone
items.description: A casino lobby application featuring game listing, category filtering, search functionality and pagination. Built with Next.js and integrated with a REST API for dynamic game data.

highlights.title: What I bring to the table
highlights.subtitle: Core technical capabilities that drive quality in every project I work on.

items.title: Performance Optimization
items.description: Delivering fast, efficient applications through modern web performance techniques.

items.title: API Integration
items.description: Seamless integration with REST APIs using modern data-fetching patterns.

items.title: Responsive Design
items.description: Crafting pixel-perfect interfaces that work flawlessly across all screen sizes.

items.title: SEO & Metadata
items.description: Maximizing discoverability with built-in Next.js metadata APIs and best practices.

contact.title: Let's work together
contact.subtitle: Have a project in mind or want to discuss opportunities? I'd love to hear from you.
contact.infoText: I'm always open to discussing new projects, creative ideas, or opportunities to be part of your vision. Feel free to reach out through the form or directly via email.
contact.messagePlaceholder: Tell me about your project or opportunity...
